epics.title: Forge CLI maintenance
epics.objective: Keep the harness scaffolding CLI correct for real bootstrap scenarios

tasks.title: forge init: per-file collision check for non-empty targets
acceptance_criteria: forge init into a non-empty target with zero collisions (e.g. .git + unrelated docs) succeeds and leaves pre-existing files byte-identical
forge init into a target containing files init would write fails with exit 1, listing the colliding paths (capped at 10, with a count of the remainder)
--force semantics unchanged: overwrites without collision check
empty-target happy path unchanged (existing repo fixture stays green)
docs/getting-started.md no longer claims init fails on any non-empty target
tasks.reviewer_focus: completeness of _would_write vs the copy loops in cmd_init (drift silently weakens the guard); collision list accuracy; no behavior change for empty targets or --force
